title: T·U·S 1.20.1
description: This mod pack was mainly created for use on T·U·S (The Unforgiving Silence) private community Minecraft servers however the pack provides a good balance on performance and features that could be used in any game session.
body:
This mod pack was mainly created for use on T·U·S private community Minecraft servers however the pack provides a good balance on performance and features that could be used in any game session.

The goal of this pack was to package a number of compatible performances improving mods, quite a few quality of life (but not game changing mods), a few what I would call function mods (aka adds something to the game), and then a couple mods that modify the world/mobs. All this combined creates a balanced modded game play while not overtly changing Minecraft. In an MP world, this allows different types of players to "play their way" while not being unbalanced or forcing a certain "tech" tree. This mod pack can provide both the vanilla game line as well as allowing a player to fully automate a world.

The main Tech mods are: Create, Farmers Delight, Tinker's Construct, MCA, and Project Red. 

Players with quad core CPU's and 2080 equivalent GPU's should see about 200FPS without a shader and ~60-50FPS with the included shader. Strongly recommend giving JAVA 8GB+ RAM, any less and there are some performance issues.

I highly recommend using this mod with the [Physics Mod Pro](https://www.patreon.com/posts/physics-mod-pro-114047283), for just the wave dynamics. 

A single mod is not listed on Modrinth and comes from the following source:
* Acedium/Nvidium (https://github.com/ferriarnus/acedium/releases)
